subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath turned towards Thy presence, sought Thy good-pleasure, and severed himself from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی قصد جنابک و طلب رضائک و انقطع عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
